description: Composition Orange T-shirt for women made of 100% organically grown cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with graphic print and nike swoosh on the front Fit Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This T-shirt from nike is designed for all your sporting needs. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh even on the hottest of days which is sure to give you exemplary comfort and become your favourite running tee. Pair it with shorts and sports shoes.
